title: [BUG] how to make the picture embed in cells
author: Kesonlin
body: ## 🐛 Bug Report Lib version: X.Y.Z 4.4.0 ## Steps To Reproduce I add the image and export the xlsx file and find that the picture is floating on the cell. I want to know how to make the picture embed in cells like below: ```javascript const imageBuffer = await axios.get('/aaa.png', { responseType: 'arraybuffer' }); const StrikerLogo = workbook.addImage({ buffer: imageBuffer.data, extension: 'png', }); worksheet.addImage(StrikerLogo, 'C2:E6'); ``` ## The expected behaviour: ## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful): ```javascript ```
